title: The Crypt of Perpetual Darkness
imageAlt: HeroQuest: The Crypt of Perpetual Darkness Box

description.paragraph: Zargon’s minions are at your doorstep, threatening the place you call home. Armed only with your effects and an ancient map of elvish origin, you must journey deep underground in search of a long-lost crypt rumoured to contain a powerful artifact. Keep this treasure from Zargon – you’re the only hope of your people!

contents.introduction: The "HeroQuest: Crypt of Perpetual Darkness" expansion includes the following components:

components.name: Cards
list: Artifact - Crown of Shadows (New and old art versions)
Artifact - Dragon Spear (New and old art versions)
